title: Prisma Kill Effect
description: adds an lightning bolt and particle effect on kill!
body:
**Particle effect does not currently work!**

⚡ Prisma Kill: Strike with Style
Prisma Kill is the ultimate client-side combat enhancement mod designed to make every PvP victory feel truly legendary. Why settle for a generic death animation when you can mark your triumph with the raw power of the elements and stunning visual geometry?

Whether you are a competitive PvPer or just enjoy a more immersive experience, this mod ensures that every final blow is an event worth seeing.

✨ Main Features
Heavenly Lightning: Automatically triggers a cinematic lightning bolt on the exact position of your defeated opponent.

Dynamic Visual Effects: Choose from multiple high-quality animations to celebrate your kill:

Shockwave: An explosive pressure wave that clears the air around your target.

Rings: Divine, expanding geometric circles that frame your victory.

Spiral: A majestic vortex of energy that rises from the ground to the sky.

Total Visual Control: You aren't stuck with defaults. You can fully customize:

Particle Amount: Crank it up for a massive explosion or keep it subtle for performance.

Custom Colors: Use a color picker or hex codes to match the effects to your personal aesthetic or team colors.

Client-Side Only: This mod works on any server (Hypixel, local SMPs, etc.) because the effects are rendered only for you. No server-side plugins required!

🛠 Advanced Configuration (Cloth Config)
We believe in ultimate player agency. Prisma Kill features a robust configuration menu powered by the Cloth Config API.

In-Game Access: Simply press the K key while in-game to open the settings menu instantly.

Toggleable Modules:

Enable or disable the Lightning Bolt visual independently.

Switch between Shockwave, Rings, or Spiral effects on the fly.

Adjust the Volume of the thunder and kill sounds.

Particle Tuning: Fine-tune the density and hue of the particles to ensure the mod looks perfect on your specific shader pack or resource pack.

🚀 Future Roadmap
This is only the beginning for Prisma Kill! I am actively working on expanding the library of animations.

[!NOTE]
Coming Soon: I plan to add even more effects, including void rifts, blood splatters (particle-based), and legendary kill streaks. Stay tuned for future updates!

📥 Installation & Requirements
To enjoy the full suite of customization options, please ensure you have the following:

Fabric Loader (or your preferred compatible loader).

Cloth Config API — Required to access the K configuration menu.

Mod Menu — Recommended so you can easily find and click the settings button in your mod list.
